svg.metadata: { "diagram": "topology-chain-cascade", "title": "Line Topology — Latch + AND Gate Backpressure", "nodes": [ {"id": "in0", "role": "input"}, {"id": "readLatch", "role": "latch"}, {"id": "readGate", "role": "and-gate"}, {"id": "i0", "role": "inhibitor", "index": 0}, {"id": "sbd0", "role": "streak-break-detector", "index": 0}, {"id": "sd0", "role": "streak-detector", "index": 0}, {"id": "syncGate", "role": "and-gate"}, {"id": "detectorLatch","role": "latch"}, {"id": "i1", "role": "inhibitor", "index": 1}, {"id": "sbd1", "role": "streak-break-detector", "index": 1}, {"id": "sd1", "role": "streak-detector", "index": 1}, {"id": "a0", "role": "pattern-and-gate"} ], "edges": [ {"id": "inputToReadLatch", "source": "in0", "target": "readLatch", "kind": "chain"}, {"id": "readLatchToI0", "source": "readLatch", "target": "i0", "kind": "chain"}, {"id": "i0ToDetectorLatch", "source": "i0", "target": "detectorLatch","kind": "chain"}, {"id": "detectorLatchToI1", "source": "detectorLatch","target": "i1", "kind": "chain"}, {"id": "i0-sbd0-old", "source": "i0", "target": "sbd0", "kind": "edge-old"}, {"id": "i0-sbd0-new", "source": "i0", "target": "sbd0", "kind": "edge-new"}, {"id": "i0-sd0-old", "source": "i0", "target": "sd0", "kind": "edge-old"}, {"id": "i0-sd0-new", "source": "i0", "target": "sd0", "kind": "edge-new"}, {"id": "i1-sbd1-old", "source": "i1", "target": "sbd1", "kind": "edge-old"}, {"id": "i1-sbd1-new", "source": "i1", "target": "sbd1", "kind": "edge-new"}, {"id": "i1-sd1-old", "source": "i1", "target": "sd1", "kind": "edge-old"}, {"id": "i1-sd1-new", "source": "i1", "target": "sd1", "kind": "edge-new"}, {"id": "sbd0-a0", "source": "sbd0", "target": "a0", "kind": "and-out"}, {"id": "sbd1-a0", "source": "sbd1", "target": "a0", "kind": "and-out"}, {"id": "sd0-sd1", "source": "sd0", "target": "sd1", "kind": "streak"}, {"id": "sbd0DoneToSyncGate", "source": "sbd0", "target": "syncGate", "kind": "signal"}, {"id": "sd0DoneToSyncGate", "source": "sd0", "target": "syncGate", "kind": "signal"}, {"id": "syncGateToDetectorLatch", "source": "syncGate", "target": "detectorLatch","kind": "release"}, {"id": "detectorLatchAckToReadGate","source": "detectorLatch","target": "readGate", "kind": "signal"}, {"id": "in0ReadyToReadGate", "source": "in0", "target": "readGate", "kind": "signal"}, {"id": "readGateToReadLatch", "source": "readGate", "target": "readLatch", "kind": "release"}, {"id": "sd1-i1-ptr", "source": "sd1", "target": "i1", "kind": "pointer"}, {"id": "sd1-sbd1-ptr", "source": "sd1", "target": "sbd1", "kind": "pointer"}, {"id": "a0-future-out", "source": "a0", "target": "downstream", "kind": "future-out"} ], "timing": { "cycleSeconds": 27, "steps": [ {"t": 0.06, "event": "in0 fires"}, {"t": 0.19, "event": "readGate fires"}, {"t": 0.30, "event": "readLatch releases"}, {"t": 0.42, "event": "i0 fires"}, {"t": 0.48, "event": "sbd0/sd0 fire; old-value reads complete (first beat)"}, {"t": 0.52, "event": "new-value reads complete (second beat)"}, {"t": 0.56, "event": "a0 fires (pattern reduction)"}, {"t": 0.60, "event": "syncGate fires"}, {"t": 0.66, "event": "feedback ack starts from detectorLatch"}, {"t": 0.72, "event": "detectorLatch releases"}, {"t": 0.84, "event": "i1 fires"}, {"t": 0.90, "event": "feedback ack arrives at readGate — cycle closes"} ] } }
svg.desc: in0 — input node feeding values into the chain readLatch, detectorLatch — latches holding one value until their AND gate fires readGate, syncGate — AND gates controlling latch release (backpressure) i0, i1 — chain inhibitor stages (shift register cells) sbd0, sbd1 — streak-break detectors: fire on sign change (1,-1 or -1,1) sd0, sd1 — streak detectors: fire on same-sign run (-1,-1 or 1,1) a0 — pattern AND gate reducing sbd outputs to one signal old/new paths (blue) — sbd/sd READ values latched in i0/i1 (open arrow = read, not write)
svg.text: Line Topology — Latch + AND Gate Backpressure

g.text: Latches hold values. AND gates control release.
backpressure: one value per pipeline cycle.
Data flow: value advances one step along the pipeline
Read-port: sbd/sd sample old+new values latched in inhibitor
Reduction: sbd outputs combine at a0 (cross-partition equality)
Ready/done pulses between nodes and AND gates
AND output unlocks a latch to advance the next value

path.title: Feedback ack: detectorLatch → readGate (closes the backpressure cycle)
